note: Documentation-as-code for the intended branch protection AND the GitHub Environments configuration. GitHub does not auto-apply this file; both sections must be configured in the GitHub UI. The required_status_checks below are the names of the jobs that MUST pass before a merge is allowed.

production.note: Required reviewers gate the manual production deploy. The deploy-production.yml workflow declares `environment: production`, so any job using it pauses for manual approval until a reviewer in the list approves. Configure this in Settings > Environments > production > Deployment protection rules.

staging.note: Staging deploy should NOT require manual approval (it auto-deploys after CI). Leave required_reviewers empty.

required_pull_request_reviews.note: Critical domains must remain CODEOWNED and require explicit owner review even in solo-founder mode. Emergency bypass stays limited to the repo owner/admins.
